name: Broomfield Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Broomfield Community Center in Broomfield, CO! There are 3 indoor wood and acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and adaptive programming. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Broomfield Industrial Park
description: Come play pickleball at Broomfield Industrial Park in Broomfield, CO! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.
open_play_schedule: If other players are waiting to play, time is limited to 30 mins per court. Group on court must rotate off and wait for next available court.

name: Broomfield Swim and Tennis Club
description: Broomfield Swim and Tennis Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Broomfield, CO. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and trainers or lessons. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

name: Countryside Outdoor Tennis Center
description: No restrooms in the winter, they remove the portapotty so be prepared

name: Life Time - Flatirons
description: Life Time - Flatirons is a place to play pickleball in Broomfield, CO. There are 11 hard courts. 9 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, locker rooms, water, restrooms, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts can be reserved.
